response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from various sources to support data interpretation accuracy. Monitor data trends to identify patterns within data sets. Record data systematically to maintain data integrity throughout the study. Analyze data using statistical methods to extract meaningful data insights. Validate data sources to ensure data reliability and consistency. Compare data from different groups to assess data variability effectively. Present data findings to guide data-driven public health decisions.
